title: Review: keyring backend implementation
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — UTF-8 restriction is documented, error messages are clear, the only real risk is the stale headless doc misleading future contributors
Confidence: 10% chance of missed bug. Least confident: keyring::Error variants — did not exhaustively verify which error types keyring crate can return for set_password. Uncertainty driven by: not reading keyring crate source. Would raise confidence if: grep keyring source for all Error variants returned by set_password.
Idiom rating: CLEAN — no unwraps in prod code, spawn_blocking used correctly, UTF-8 check placed optimally, split_once is a minor improvement
